title: Judaism and Christianity key terms
description: Check your knowledge of key terms related to the develop of Judaism and Christianity!

assessment_items.question_content:
**How was Judaism different from most other ancient religions?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It did not have specific rules for its followers

assessment_items.question_content:
**How was Judaism connected to the development of Christianity?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Christians adopted Jewish practices after Jews were forced out of Judea
Christianity started as a Jewish sect, and its central figure, Jesus, was born Jewish
Christians were Jews who challenged Roman rule of Judea

assessment_items.question_content:
**What did the Edict of Milan, issued by Constantine in 313 CE, do?**


[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It said Christianity would receive legal status
It said paganism could no longer be practiced
It said Christianity would be the official religion of the Roman Empire

assessment_items.question_content:
**What did the Edict of Thessalonica, issued by Theodosius in 380 CE, do?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It said Nicene Christianity would be the official religion of the Roman Empire
It said all Christian sects were considered equal
Someone who believed in a non-orthodox version of Christianity
Someone who believed in official Church doctrine
